title: [InstCombine] Fold neg arg in hyperbolic lib functions
author: xuhongxu96
patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyLibCalls.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyLibCalls.cpp
index 6bd250aecd977..b60f0c7021d51 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyLibCalls.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyLibCalls.cpp
@@ -3029,16 +3029,28 @@ Value *LibCallSimplifier::optimizeSymmetric(CallInst *CI, LibFunc Func,
   case LibFunc_cos:
   case LibFunc_cosf:
   case LibFunc_cosl:
+
+  case LibFunc_cosh:
+  case LibFunc_coshf:
+  case LibFunc_coshl:
     return optimizeSymmetricCall(CI, /*IsEven*/ true, B);
 
   case LibFunc_sin:
   case LibFunc_sinf:
   case LibFunc_sinl:
 
+  case LibFunc_sinh:
+  case LibFunc_sinhf:
+  case LibFunc_sinhl:
+
   case LibFunc_tan:
   case LibFunc_tanf:
   case LibFunc_tanl:
 
+  case LibFunc_tanh:
+  case LibFunc_tanhf:
+  case LibFunc_tanhl:
+
   case LibFunc_erf:
   case LibFunc_erff:
   case LibFunc_erfl:
description:
Fix #173706 (it is closed but not really fixed). 

The previous PR #173730 only addressed the **intrinsics** `@llvm.sinh.f64` etc, which does not have effects on the C program compiled without `-fno-math-errno`.

I validated the optimization by `clang -O2`.

tests.test_body:
declare double @sinh(double)

define double @neg_sinh_negated_arg(double %x) {
  %neg = fneg double %x
  %r = call double @sinh(double %neg)
  %rn = fneg double %r
  ret double %rn
}

declare double @tanh(double)

define double @neg_tanh_negated_arg(double %x) {
  %neg = fneg double %x
  %r = call double @tanh(double %neg)
  %rn = fneg double %r
  ret double %rn
}

declare double @sinh(double)

declare void @use(double)

define double @sinh_negated_arg_extra_use(double %x) {
  %neg = fneg double %x
  %r = call double @sinh(double %neg)
  call void @use(double %neg)
  ret double %r
}
